title: Xenial Lemon Mediterranean Chicken Skillet
description: A floral and tender Mediterranean dish featuring lemons and beurre-monte, cooked to perfection in a comal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a comal over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the comal and set aside to rest.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the beurre-monte to the comal.
Once the beurre-monte is melted, add the garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper to the comal.
Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly, until the garlic is fragrant.
Stir in the lemon juice and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the comal and spoon some of the sauce over the top of each breast.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the chicken is coated in the sauce.
